column1: The 'absorption cross section' of Ozone at the relevant wavelength has been updated
by the BIPM (the international bureau of weights and measures) and reflected within
the updated CEN reference method EN14625:2024. This results in an increase of ~1.24%
and will dramatically improve measurement uncertainty - this change has been applied
Please refer to the UK-AIR data page ( https://uk-air.defra.gov.uk/data/ ) for further details:
Hourly measurement data supplied by UK-air on 10/01/2026
Status: V=Verified P=Provisionaly Verified N=Not Verified S=Suspect
